ecall.title: Strategic Sessions Inside a Branded Window
ecall.description: A space designed for workshops, idea storming, and real-time decisions, wrapped in an ANNiA-owned interface.
ecall.note: We build creative tension and focus: the conversation leads, everything else fades.

card.title: ANNiA Working Room
card.description: A clean window for high-impact workshops, with guidance, agenda, and clear next steps.
card.subtle: Built for intense sessions and shared decisions.

room.title: E-Call, No Distractions
room.subtitle: An integrated experience with ANNiA identity and full team focus.
room.cardCopy: Audio, video, and chat wrapped in a custom layer for workshops and idea storming.
room.readyCopy: Allow camera and microphone when prompted for a smooth session.
room.brandNote: The conversation happens here. Everything else stays in the background.

prep.title: Before You Enter
items: Have the session goal and key participants ready.
Use headphones to reduce background noise.
Share your screen only when needed.

support.title: Need Help Accessing the Room?
support.copy: Our team will guide you in and unblock anything within minutes.

steps.title: How the E-Call Feels
steps.subtitle: Designed to raise creative tension and sustain clarity.

items.title: Owned Identity
items.copy: The environment keeps our palette, typography, and tone so teams feel at home.

items.title: Idea Storming
items.copy: Guided dynamics to unlock ideas, surface tension, and prioritize action.

items.title: Actionable Close
items.copy: We end with clear agreements, owners, and a summary that fuels the work after.

ecall.whatsappMessage: Hi, I need support entering the ANNiA e-call.
